meaning: adj.无法接受的,不受欢迎的
examples: It is totally unacceptable for children to swear.
Racism is wholly unacceptable under any circumstances.
It described the situation as "totally unacceptable" and said all affected sites had been given "unreserved apologies".
What Michael Noer said is socially unacceptable and I can see why people are offended by it.
